description: A planner reviews the initial work sequence for a quay crane and sees it can be improved to reduce travel time for yard equipment.

nodes.task_description: Generate the initial, default work queue for a crane.

expected_outcome.value: The planner has the list of container moves for QC-01.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the sequence, noting that it involves picking containers from many different, distant yard blocks.

expected_outcome.value: The planner identifies that the sequence is inefficient for the yard equipment.

nodes.task_description: Manually re-sequence the crane's work queue to prioritize loading all containers from one yard block before moving to the next.

expected_outcome.value: The work queue is reordered to improve yard efficiency, and the new sequence is sent to the crane operator.
